ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Women, Men, Kids) */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size (e.g., XS = 1, S = 2, M = 3, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, IT, UK, FR, JP) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the conversion */,
  "conversion_value" INTEGER /* Conversion value for the size in the specified region */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., Bust, Waist, Hip) */,
  "conversion_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "body_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the body type */,
  "body_type_order" INTEGER /* Order of body types (e.g., Bust = 1, Waist = 2, Hip = 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "garment_style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment style being measured */,
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the body type being measured */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Measurement value for the specified body type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_body_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_type_id") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_garment_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_style_id") REFERENCES garment_styles ("garment_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_styles" (
  "garment_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the garment style */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment (e.g., T-Shirt, Dress, Pants) */,
  "garment_gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the garment is designed (e.g., Women, Men, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "garment_style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment style for the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size for the size chart */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version of the size chart (e.g., v1.0, v1.1) */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_garment_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_style_id") REFERENCES garment_styles ("garment_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the sale */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Price at which the garment was sold */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., Online, In-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being inventoried */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the inventory */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "inventory_price" REAL /* Price of the garment in inventory */,
  "inventory_source" TEXT /* Source of the inventory (e.g., Supplier, Manufacturer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, sales, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "designer_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the designer */,
  "designer_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the designer (e.g., Women's Wear, Men's Wear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "sales_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is part of the sales team */,
  "sales_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "sales_team_description" TEXT /* Description of the sales team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an administrator */,
  "admin_user_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "admin_user_description" TEXT /* Description of the administrator */,
  "admin_access_level" TEXT /* Level of admin access (e.g., System, Data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
